title: Yes, Please Digi Version + Giveaway
excerpt: Some fantastic layouts were created using the digi elements by Linda Roos, Miki Krueger, and Nicole Leblanc. GIVEAWAY To celebrate, we're giving the entire collection away to 1 lucky winner. Simply leave a comment about what anything you say "yes,…
body:
Some fantastic layouts were created using the digi elements by Linda Roos, Miki Krueger, and Nicole Leblanc.

GIVEAWAY To celebrate, we're giving the entire collection away to 1 lucky winner. Simply leave a comment about what anything you say "yes, please" to and a winner will be selected on Wednesday, May 22 at 7am PST. Winner of Yes, Please from AC Digitals will be announced on this post. And for a bonus entry, you may want to check out @amytangerine on Instagram where you and a friend can win! Good luck! UPDATE: Here is the winner, #16 - Jessica Lauton says: May 20, 2013 at 9:08 am Cuddle? Coffee? Movie? Chocolate? Blogs? Yes, Please! Thanks, Amy! CONGRATS!
